texto: Today like every day roughly 5,000 people on the face of the planet will experience one-chance-in-a-million things and not one of them will refuse to believe the evidence of their senses.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jill Thompson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a tempo. O trecho “Today like every day roughly 5,000 people on the face of the planet will experience one-chance-in…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, anansi-boys, miracles pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de miracles.
